name: Strawberry Daiquiri
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the tops of the strawberries and place them on a cookie sheet. Freeze.
2. Once frozen, remove from the freezer and place in a blender.
3. Add the lemonade concentrate, rum, and about a handful of ice cubes to the blender.
4. Blend until smooth.
5. Pour into cups and serve.
